CVE-2025-29482.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in libheif 1.19.7 allows a local at ...
CVE-2025-29482.summary: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in libheif 1.19.7 allows a local attacker to execute arbitrary code via the SAO (Sample Adaptive Offset) processing of libde265.
